# Developer

The docs subdirectory is where you can find useful information about the structure of this repository

## Repository Overview

* [core](../core/) = the core/shared modules of the repository
  * [gen](../core/gen/) = resources that are automatically generated by core subdirectories
  * [kubernetes](../core/kubernetes/) = common kubernetes definitions used by components
  * [libraries](../core/libraries/) = custom libraries separated by coding language
  * [monitoring](../core/monitoring/) = common monitoring config used by components
  * [protobuf](../core/protobuf/) = common communication messages between components
  * [terraform](../core/terraform/) = custom terraform modules used in each domain

* [docs](../docs) = the documentation for the repository
  * [guides](../docs/guides/) = useful guides for how to setup components or perform actions 

* [domains](../domains/) = the domains of the project
  * [default](../domains/default/) = for components shared between all domains

## Makefiles

Throughout the repository there will be [Makefile](../Makefile)s, which are simple files that help automate some commands. 

In each directory where there is a Makefile you can run the following to see the available commands:

```bash
make help

Property-Fundamentals - Makefile usage:
  help             Prints the list of commands available
```
